text.title: Stakeholder Sentiment Tracker — Output Contract
text.summary: A weekly stakeholder-sentiment artefact: consent recorded, three-class classification, trend line, alarm policy, and (when fired) a 72-hour action plan.

example.note: Numeric score forbidden; no consent_date; no trend; alarm policy missing.

antipattern.reason: Hides markers behind a number; invites threshold gaming.
Pipeline cannot be defended if challenged.
Notification, not a tool — must block next run.

list.item: Alarm policy fires on 2-week decline or single-week hostile.
Action plan attached within 72h of alarm.
